headline: Chubb Reports Second Quarter Per Share Net Income of $7.30 and Per Share Core Operating Income of $7.26, Up 18.2%; Consolidated Net Premiums Written of $14.7 Billion, Up 3.6%, with P&C and Life Insurance Up 3.0% and 7.5%; P&C Combined Ratio of 83.8%
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) today reported net income for the quarter ended June 30, 2026 of $2.85 billion, or $7.30 per share, and core operating income of $2.84 billion, or $7.26 per share. Book value per share and tangible book value per share increased 12.3% and 17.1%, respectively, from June 30, 2025 and now stand at $195.45 and $131.93. headline: Chubb (CB) Appoints James Wixtead Chair And Michael O'Donnell President At Tempest Re
summary: Chubb has announced leadership changes at its global reinsurance arm, Chubb Tempest Re. James Wixtead has been appointed Executive Chairman of Chubb Tempest Re. Michael O'Donnell has been named President of Chubb Tempest Re. These leadership changes come as Chubb, traded on the NYSE under ticker NYSE:CB, continues to be closely watched by investors following a multi year share price move, with the stock at $352.53. headline: Chubb Likely To Report Higher Q2 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) to release Q2 earnings on July 21. Analysts expect $6.73 EPS and $13.01B revenue. Raised dividend, $7.5B buyback announced.
